title: Canyons 100K Crew Guide
subtitle: 16h36 expected plan. Crew arrivals include a 60-minute buffer. Official updates win.
versionNote: Version: Pantoll-calibrated expected pace, 16h36 schedule. Next pass: exact maps, parking screenshots, and product-specific fuel math.

stops.name: China Wall Start
stops.note: Runner-only shuttle. Leave with the first long-leg fuel loaded.
stops.resupplyNote: Use Deadwood full aid. Carry enough preferred fuel for the no-food Devils Thumb loop.

stops.name: Deadwood 1
stops.note: Refill and keep enough food for the Devils Thumb loop through Deadwood 2.

stops.name: Devils Thumb 1
stops.note: Water/electrolyte only. No food. Keep moving unless bottles are low.

stops.name: Swinging Bridge
stops.note: Reset for the steep climb back to Devils Thumb.

stops.name: Devils Thumb 2
stops.note: Top off if needed. Food still comes from what you carried out of Deadwood 1.

stops.name: Deadwood 2
stops.note: Refill for the push to first crew. Start heat management early.

stops.name: Michigan Bluff
stops.crewCallout: CREW HERE: arrive by 10:40 AM. Fast bottle swap, cooling, sunscreen, quick stomach/feet check.
stops.resupplyNote: Short crew-to-crew block. Keep the handoff fast and leave with simple calories.

stops.name: Foresthill
stops.crewCallout: CREW HERE: arrive by 12:15 PM. Main reset: bottles, drop bag, socks/lube if needed, preferred fuel for Cal Street.
stops.resupplyNote: Longest crew-to-crew block. Use Cal 2 full aid, but leave Foresthill with the block covered.

stops.name: Cal 2
stops.note: Long no-crew leg follows. Refill hard here.

stops.name: Drivers Flat
stops.crewCallout: CREW HERE: arrive by 4:45 PM. Last handoff: lights, warmth, calories through the finish, decisive exit.
stops.resupplyNote: Final personal-fuel load. Add light, warm layer, and enough finish fuel to avoid bargaining.

stops.name: Mammoth Bar
stops.note: Eat if possible. The finish is close enough to simplify, not close enough to stop fueling.

stops.name: Confluence
stops.note: Final aid. Calories, fluid, then climb to Auburn.

stops.name: Downtown Auburn Finish
stops.note: Warm layer, dry shoes, simple food, and no complicated decisions.

crewCheatSheet.name: Michigan Bluff
crewCheatSheet.detail: Fast stop. Bottles, cooling, sunscreen, trash, quick stomach/feet check.

crewCheatSheet.name: Foresthill
crewCheatSheet.detail: Main reset. Drop bag, socks/lube if needed, preferred fuel, weather choice.

crewCheatSheet.name: Drivers Flat
crewCheatSheet.detail: Final handoff. Light, warmth, finish fuel, confidence, and send.

maps.name: Michigan Bluff
maps.detail: Crew allowed. Plan for up to a 1.5 mile walk-in from designated parking.

maps.name: Foresthill
maps.detail: Crew and drop bag. Plan for up to a 1 mile walk-in from designated parking.

maps.name: Drivers Flat
maps.detail: Last crew stop. Plan for up to a 1 mile walk-in from designated parking.

sources.label: Course description, date, start time, distance, and GPX link

sources.title: Official Aid Chart
sources.label: Miles, elevation, cutoffs, crew, and drop-bag locations
